<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\FlareMiddleware; use Closure; use Spatie\Backtrace\Backtrace; use Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; use Throwable; class AddExceptionHandledStatus implements FlareMiddleware { public function handle(Report $report, Closure $next) { $frames = Backtrace::create()->limit(40)->frames(); $frameCount = count($frames); try { foreach ($frames as $i => $frame) { // Check first frame, probably Illuminate\Foundation\Exceptions\Handler::report() // Next frame should be: Illuminate/Foundation/helpers.php::report() if ($frame->method !== 'report') { continue; } if ($frame->class === null) { continue; } if ($i === $frameCount - 1) { continue; } if ($frames[$i + 1]->class !== null) { continue; } if ($frames[$i + 1]->method !== 'report') { continue; } $report->handled(); break; } } catch (Throwable) { // Do nothing } return $next($report); } }
